targets.expr:
last_over_time(
  {user_unit="coinbase-trader-ws.service"} 
  | regexp `Portfolio Value: \$(?P<balance_str>[0-9,.]+)`
  | line_format `{{ .balance_str | replace "," "" }}`
  | regexp `(?P<balance>[0-9.]+)`
  | unwrap balance [5m]
)
{user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"} |= "Mint complete" or {user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"} |= "Mint confirmed" or {user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"} |= "Mint confirmation failed"
